items.translated_title: US lawmakers demand answers from Instructure after Canvas data breaches

items.title: Medicare’s new payment model is built for AI, and most of the tech world has no idea
items.creator: Connie Loizos
items.summary: 无法生成摘要（API请求失败）。
items.translated_title: Medicare’s new payment model is built for AI, and most of the tech world has no idea
items.content: There is no governmental mechanism to pay for an AI agent that monitors a patient between visits, calls to check in, coordinates a housing referral, or makes sure someone picks up their medication. ACCESS creates that mechanism for the first time.

items.translated_title: Kevin Hartz’s A* just closed its third fund with $450 million
items.content: The firm takes a generalist approach, backing companies across categories such as AI applications, fintech, healthcare, and security. The average check size for this fund will be between $3 million and $5 million, with the aim to back at least 30 startups.

items.title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
items.creator: Tim Fernholz
items.summary: 无法生成摘要（API请求失败）。
items.translated_title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
items.content: Altman said that Musk's focus on controlling the initial for-profit gave him pause because OpenAI was dedicated to keeping advanced AI out of the hands of a single person, and Altman, with his experience running the prominent startup accelerator Y Combinator, knew "founders who had control usually did not give it up."

items.translated_title: Google’s ‘Create My Widget’ feature will let you vibe code your own widgets
items.content: To create a widget, users will be able to describe what they want using natural language. For example, you could ask the feature to "suggest three high-protein meal prep recipes every week" in order to get a custom dashboard that you can add and resize on your home screen.
